response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or financial domain exposure, which are mandatory requirements; his C++ work is limited to a brief academic thesis and NI LabWindows™/CVI (non-Windows-focused), with no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or SQL Server/Oracle expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops
Proven track record in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps infrastructure setup
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience is listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context
